## Summary

Describe the change and the user-visible behavior.

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran relevant tests or explained why not.
- [ ] I added or preserved `Signed-off-by` DCO trailers on commits.
- [ ] I did not add real student data, credentials, local databases, generated traces, or private screenshots.
- [ ] I reviewed license/dependency impact for new dependencies or bundled assets.
- [ ] I kept ScriptScorePlus as hosted API client-side support only.
- [ ] I updated public docs when behavior changed.
